mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.name FROM tag t INNER JOIN question_tag_rel qtr ON t.id = qtr.tag_id WHERE qtr.question_id = #{questionId}
SELECT id, title, content, answer, category, difficulty, direction, view_count, favorite_count, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM question WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE question SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE question SET favorite_count = favorite_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE question SET favorite_count = GREATEST(favorite_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question (title, content, answer, category, difficulty, direction) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{answer}, #{category}, #{difficulty}, #{direction})

INSERT INTO question (title, content, answer, category, difficulty, direction) VALUES
(#{q.title}, #{q.content}, #{q.answer}, #{q.category}, #{q.difficulty}, #{q.direction})
mapper.update:
UPDATE question
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
answer = #{answer},
category = #{category},
difficulty = #{difficulty},
direction = #{direction},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
